sap.headline: SAP: The Intelligence Layer for Solana

kg.title: Ontology-Backed Knowledge Graph
kg.desc: Models Solana-specific constructs into a formal semantic layer that supports reusable analytics, explainable querying, and grounded AI outputs.

etl.title: Deterministic ETL Pipelines
etl.desc: Synchronizes raw on-chain activity into structured, queryable representations designed for downstream analytics, reasoning, and visualization.

ai.title: Hallucination-Resistant AI Reasoning
ai.desc: Uses the knowledge graph as a grounding layer so answers, charts, and summaries stay traceable to structured blockchain evidence.

discovery.title: Natural Language Discovery
discovery.desc: Enables complex blockchain investigations through plain-language prompts, guided follow-ups, and explainable results.

dashboard.title: Interactive Smart Dashboards
dashboard.desc: Generates user-defined charts and tables for real-time monitoring of token activity, program behavior, and ecosystem patterns.

context.title: On-Chain + Off-Chain Context
context.desc: Merges live network activity with semantic metadata and external context for deeper investigation and more meaningful insights.

queries.title: Natural-language investigation, grounded by structure
queries.body: SAP turns conversational requests into structured semantic operations, returning explainable results that can be pinned, shared, and revisited.

qlever.title: QLever KG
qlever.subtitle: Knowledge graph engine
qlever.desc: Processes large semantic datasets for grounded retrieval and explainable query execution.

triton.title: Triton RPC
triton.subtitle: Blockchain data access
triton.desc: Provides high-concurrency access to historical and live Solana ledger activity.

openai.title: OpenAI API
openai.subtitle: Reasoning layer
openai.desc: Transforms natural-language requests into grounded analyses, narratives, and artifacts.

sap.lead: Simplifying Solana blockchain data exploration through natural language, connecting complex on-chain data to usable insights through grounded reasoning and a semantic knowledge graph.

cta.title: Ready to explore Solana through a semantic intelligence layer?
cta.desc: Sign in above to access your workspace and start building grounded analytics workflows.
cta.description: Sign in above to access your workspace and start pinning insights.

llm.title: Solana-Tailored LLM Pipeline
llm.desc: A specialized AI reasoning engine built to understand Solana-specific data structures, analytics workflows, and semantic models.

kg.title: Solana Knowledge Graph
kg.desc: A semantic source of truth linking on-chain activity with off-chain metadata for contextual, explainable blockchain analysis.

dashboards.title: User-Centric Smart Dashboards
dashboards.desc: Interactive workspaces where users pin AI-generated charts and tables for real-time monitoring and exploration.

step1.title: Ask in Natural Language
step1.desc: Users can input blockchain questions using everyday language — no SQL or SPARQL required.

step2.title: Semantic Translation
step2.desc: SAP translates human questions into structured semantic operations over the Solana intelligence layer.

step3.title: Instant Visual Results
step3.desc: Results are automatically rendered into charts, tables, and reusable artifacts.

examples.0: Show validator activity with the largest stake movement in the last 24 hours
examples.1: Compare transaction flow patterns for the top Solana programs this week
examples.2: Summarize token activity anomalies and explain what changed
examples.body: Examples of advanced queries the platform is designed to support.
examples.title: Complex Analytics Made More Accessible

items.query: List the top 5 Solana tokens by recent volume change
Compare validator activity with the largest stake movement this week
Show programs with unusual transaction flow patterns

footer.tagline: Building advanced data and AI infrastructure for decentralized ecosystems.
